title: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab versus sunitinib for first-line treatment of advanced renal cell carcinoma: final analysis of efficacy and safety from the phase III CheckMate 214 trial.
abstract: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab (NIVO + IPI) demonstrated significant long-term survival and response benefits in patients with previously untreated advanced renal cell carcinoma (aRCC) in the phase III CheckMate 214 trial (NCT02231749). We report final efficacy and safety results with 9.3 years median follow-up.
trial_name: Nivolumab plus Ipilimumab versus Sunitinib in Advanced Renal-Cell Carcinoma
